title: Tianhui Plastics Group won the Supply Chain Special Practice Award
contentHtml:
On October 23, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Group was invited to participate in the "2020 Wangsheng Supply Chain and Industrial Chain Lecture Hall" co-sponsored by Zhejiang Wangsheng Business Bao Co., Ltd. and Shanghai Pudong Development Bank Hangzhou Branch. The activities include: Netsheng Supply Chain Lecture Hall, Shanghai Pudong Development Bank Digital Supply Chain Seminar, and Supply Chain Business Development Closed Forum.


At the meeting, Wangsheng Businessbao and Shanghai Pudong Development Bank jointly awarded three awards for the "SPD-Business Bao Online Supply Chain Finance Project". Among them, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Group won the Supply Chain Special Practice Award. Tianhui Plastics Group took the stage as the only enterprise representative to speak.Wangsheng Business Bao provides supply chain financial services to the group, effectively solving the problems of difficult and expensive financing for small and medium-sized enterprises and further promoting economic development.
titleZh: 天晖塑料集团荣获供应链特别实践奖
contentHtmlZh:
10月23日，秦皇岛天晖塑料集团受邀参加由浙江网盛生意宝股份有限公司、浦发银行杭州分行共同主办的“2020网盛供应链与产业链大讲堂”活动。活动环节包括：网盛供应链大讲堂、浦发银行数字供应链研讨会、供应链业务发展闭门论坛会。


会上，网盛生意宝与浦发银行共同为“浦发-生意宝在线供应链金融项目”颁发了三个奖项。其中，秦皇岛天晖塑料集团荣获供应链特别实践奖。天晖塑料集团作为唯一一个企业代表上台发言。网盛生意宝为集团提供供应链金融服务，切实解决中小企业融资难、融资贵问题，进一步推动经济发展。
